@startuml
actor Jugador
participant Telegram as t1 <<boundary>> {skinparam backgroundColor #EEEBDC}
control Gestor as g2 <<circle>> {skinparam backgroundColor #DDF0FF}
entity Ranking as r3 <<database>> {skinparam backgroundColor #FFF4CE}
object User as u5 <<sphere>>  {skinparam backgroundColor #E7FFE6 } 
timer Timer as tm8<<clock>>{ skinparam backgroundcolor LightBlue}  
interface Options as o9 <<rectangle>> 

box "Guanyar Partida" #LightGray
Jugador ->>t1 : Seleccionar_opcio()   
activate t1    
    activate t1        
        t1->g2: Realitzar_jugada(self,bot,update)     
            ref over g2:g2\nDesplaçar-se per l'escenari()\nendref            
                rect rgb(255,255,255)\ng2-->tm8:GetTimer()\ntm8-->>g2:return(timer)\ndeactivate tm8\ng2 -->u5:RestarSeg()\nu5 -- >>g2:Return(bool)\ndeuactivete u5 \ng2-->o9:get_texts(ind)\no9-->>g2: Return(String)\ndeactiveate o9   \ng2-->o9:get_options(ind)\no9-->>g2: Return(String)\ndeactiavte o9     \ng2-->o9:get_realitzar_mod(ind)\no9-->>g2: Return(String)\ndeacitvate o9      endrect                
                    box Emmagatzemar_Ranking#lightgray                    
                        activateg2                        
                            activerankinr                            
                                rankig<---AddtoRanking(User):return(bool);deativate ranking; deactivate gestorendboox                                
                                    boxt Mostrar_ranking light gray                                        
                                        activegestro                                            
                                            activaerangking                                                
                                                rangik<-FiveFirstRaking(): return bool(); deativateraniking                                                            
                                                    acivteraning                                                        
                                                        ranink <-printRanking (): retunrnbool (); detivearnkign                                                                                                    
                                                            enbdox                                                                                                                                          
                                                                tg-<>jugadro(Return(string)) ;deteciate telegram;jugadror - >Telegram(return string ) ,dectievajugdordetctivetelgram@endumll
